signals.author: U0BRIAN
signals.text: Heads up — Forter is still not returning decisions for ~3% of beta transactions. Until that's resolved we can't sign off FRAUD-001. Treating this as a blocker for the ramp-up.

signals.author: U0SEHBA
signals.text: Decision from the Juspay sync: we will route TH + ID acquiring through local rails first (LAQ-001) before extending to the rest of APAC. Owner is me, target end of Feb.

signals.author: U0PHAM
signals.text: Beta auth rate held at 82.4% this week. SCALE-020 stabilization looking good, no new Opera guarantee errors since the mapping fix went in.

signals.author: U0BRIAN
signals.text: Action: someone needs to chase Checkout.com on the payout report discrepancy before Friday — still blocking reconciliation sign-off. I'll own it unless ops wants it.

signals.author: U0DEV
signals.text: anyone up for lunch at the thai place downstairs?
